/usr/bin/cc -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names "CMakeFiles/test-c.dir/test-c.c.o" -o ../bin/test-c  -Wl,-rpath,/Users/granvalenti/Work/tecnologia-sota/tlama/lmcode/clean/bin ../bin/libllama.0.0.0.dylib ../bin/libggml.0.9.8.dylib ../bin/libggml-cpu.0.9.8.dylib ../bin/libggml-blas.0.9.8.dylib ../bin/libggml-metal.0.9.8.dylib ../bin/libggml-base.0.9.8.dylib
